title: senecio × subnebrodensis
intro: Senecio × subnebrodensis, also known as woolly groundsel, is a hybrid plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to have a range of health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Woolly groundsel can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
